narrative:
Oakwood-05-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 420 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 5.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 44.8%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 39.3 percentage points.
